ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.target: 自动化例程当前已暂停。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The time-zone in which the authoring date should be shown. Either your local time-zone (default), the author's time-zone during commit creation or UTC\xB100:00.
ast.target: 应显示作者日期的时区。 可以是您的本地时区（默认）， 提交创建时作者所处的时区，或 UTC\xB100:00。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same.
If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection.
ast.target:
默认情况下，空白字符与换行符会被解释为 文档及更改的一部分（因此不会被忽略）。 这会导致在添加新的后续行时，最后一行会被显示为“已更改”， 即使先前最后一行的文本保持不变。
如果您不关注纯空白字符更改 （例如：列表嵌套/引用缩进更改）， 启用此项将提供更具意义的更改检测。

ast.name: outerHTML
error

ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组（Uint8Array）支持。若需要兼容旧版浏览器，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.target: 检测到网络错误，但当前已处于离线模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to use one interval for commit and another for sync.
ast.target: 启用后，可分别为提交与同步使用不同的时间间隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Push commits every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.
ast.target: 每隔 X 分钟推送提交。设置为 0（默认值）以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pull changes every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.
ast.target: 每隔 X 分钟拉取变更。设置为 0（默认值）以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You will get a pop up to specify your message.
ast.target: 系统将弹出一个窗口，以便您指定消息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message).
ast.target: 可用占位符：{{date}}（见下文）、{{hostname}}（见下文）、{{numFiles}}（提交中更改的文件数量）以及 {{files}}（提交消息中的已更改文件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A script that is run using 'sh -c' to generate the commit message. May be used to generate commit messages using AI tools. Available placeholders: {{hostname}}, {{date}}.
ast.target: 一个通过“sh -c”运行以生成提交消息的脚本。可用于借助 AI 工具生成提交消息。可用占位符：{{hostname}}、{{date}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify custom hostname for every device. Defaults to the OS hostname if not set on desktop.
ast.target: 为每台设备指定自定义主机名。若在桌面端未设置，则默认使用操作系统主机名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 当 Obsidian 启动时自动拉取提交。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.
ast.target: Hunk 是在编辑器中对成组的行级变更进行归并后的区段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.
ast.target: 此功能允许您通过彩色标记在编辑器中直接查看变更，并对单个 hunk 执行暂存/重置/预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the author of the commit in the history view.
ast.target: 在历史视图中显示提交的作者。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.
ast.target: 在历史视图中显示提交日期。将使用 {{date}} 占位符的格式来显示日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.
ast.target: 在较慢的设备上，这可能会导致卡顿。如出现该情况，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.
ast.target: 文件发生更改后，在刷新源代码控制视图之前等待的毫秒数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.
ast.target: 设置差异视图的样式。请注意，“Split”模式下的实际差异并非由 Git 生成，而是由编辑器自身生成，因此可能与 Git 生成的差异不同。其一项优势是，您可以在该视图中直接编辑文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable informative notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).
ast.target: 禁用用于 Git 操作的信息性通知，以最大限度减少干扰（更新请参阅状态栏）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable error notifications of any kind to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).
ast.target: 禁用任何类型的错误通知，以最大限度减少干扰（更新请参阅状态栏）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.
ast.target: 在没有可提交或可推送的更改时，不显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.
ast.target: 必须重启 Obsidian，使更改生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.
ast.target: 在文件菜单中添加“Stage”“Unstage”和“Add to .gitignore”操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.
ast.target: 输入您的密码。您将无法再次查看该密码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be required for special setups.
ast.target: 这些设置通常无需更改，但在特殊配置中可能为必需。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: "Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.
ast.target: “Commit-and-sync”和“pull”会处理子模块。缺失功能：冲突文件、拉取/推送/提交文件的计数。需要为每个子模块设置跟踪分支。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).
ast.target: 每当在根仓库发生检出时，对子模块递归执行检出（若相应分支存在）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.
ast.target: 指定 Git 二进制文件/可执行文件的路径。Git 应已在您的 PATH 中。通常仅在使用自定义安装的 Git 时才需要设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .
ast.target: 每行用于一个新的环境变量，格式为 KEY=VALUE。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use each line for one path

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
ast.target:
设置应从中执行 Git 二进制文件的 Vault 相对路径。
             主要用于设置 Git 仓库的路径；仅当 Git 仓库位于 Vault 根目录之下时才需要此项。Windows 上请使用 "\\" 替代 "/"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\" instead of "/" on Windows.
ast.target: 对应于 GIT_DIR 环境变量。需要重启 Obsidian 后才会生效。Windows 上请使用 "\" 替代 "/"。

ast.name: setDesc

regex.source:
setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)
regex.target:
setDesc(`
            Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
            `)

regex.source: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')
regex.target: setDesc('Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.')
